detail: Validated memory-matrix subprocess failure bundles now carry non-empty linkage.log_session_ids when runtime sessions are available. Commands: cargo test -p memory-matrix subprocess_probe_persists_full_failure_bundle_fields -- --nocapture (pass), cargo test -p memory-matrix subprocess_spawn_probe_reports_spawn_failure_bundle -- --nocapture (pass), cargo test -p memory-matrix mcp::tests:: -- --nocapture (pass).
